So the whole process starts with our kickoff and so that's why we limit to only two kickoffs a week and why we're booked through April 28th is because like we want to make sure like we do a ton of research already before our call and we're already understanding your company but then during the kickoff call it's an hour long and we're going deeper into your company your goals like your competitors the way you go about producing content today if any and then from there we do some deep dive sessions if there's additional things we need to go you know talk to someone on your side to understand from there we start to develop the entire content strategy for you to present to you an initial version the next week right and then at that in parallel we're also doing what's called content calibration where one of our editors is producing an initial piece of content that is relevant to you so that your team or you can look at it and kind of calibrate the quality the style of the tone and everything else right and that's what we use is kind of like our bullseye of
